title: Orchestra Otters
short_description: Close your eyes and listen! Each otter plays a sound — is it soft and breathy woodwind, a bright buzzy brass, a singing string, or a thumping drum? Name the family.
description: The Orchestra Otters are tuning up, and every sound belongs to an instrument family with its own character — the airy tone of woodwind, the bold buzz of brass, the singing sweep of strings, the ring of keys, and the punch of percussion. A sound plays, and you decide which family made it, training your ear to hear timbre: the special colour that tells one instrument from another. Grade bands ramp from three very different families, to four, to all five with closer, trickier tones. Every sound is synthesized live in your browser — no recordings — so listen for the shape of the sound, not a tune. Correct ears and streaks earn bonus points. A free online instruments, timbre and listening music game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Listen to the sound (tap replay to hear it again), then tap the instrument family.
